mapper.sql: id, application_id, stable_monthly_income, monthly_debt_payment, dti, foir, disposable_income, income_stability_score, max_affordable_emi, recommended_credit_limit, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repayment_capacity_result (application_id, stable_monthly_income, monthly_debt_payment, dti, foir, disposable_income, income_stability_score, max_affordable_emi, recommended_credit_limit, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{stableMonthlyIncome}, #{monthlyDebtPayment}, #{dti}, #{foir}, #{disposableIncome}, #{incomeStabilityScore}, #{maxAffordableEmi}, #{recommendedCreditLimit}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM repayment_capacity_result WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
